prerequisites: An Employment Hero account with access to the Developer Portal (reachable from your organisation under your profile menu, or at the developer portal API URL for your organisation).

An OAuth 2.0 application registered in the Developer Portal so you can obtain Client ID and Client Secret credentials. Scopes are selected once at application creation and the scope list is provided by Employment Hero.
A valid OAuth access token to use as the connector's api_key. Access tokens expire 15 minutes after creation, so refresh as needed using your refresh token.
The organization ID(s) you want to sync (found via the organizations stream) if you want to populate organization_configids.
The employee ID(s) within the organisation (found via the employees stream) if you want to populate employees_configids.

authMethods.name: API key (OAuth 2.0 bearer access token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single api_key, which is a bearer access token from Employment Hero's OAuth 2.0 framework. You register an application in the Developer Portal to get a Client ID and Client Secret, run the OAuth handshake to obtain an access token, then supply that token as api_key. Access tokens expire 15 minutes after creation; use the refresh token to renew.

setupSteps.title: Register an OAuth application
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Employment Hero, open the Developer Portal from your profile menu (or your organisation's developer portal API page), and click Add Application. Provide an application name, select the scopes you need (scopes are a one-time selection at creation; the scope list is provided by Employment Hero), and set an HTTPS redirect URI. Save the application to receive your Client ID and Client Secret.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an access token
setupSteps.body: Run the OAuth 2.0 authorization-code flow using your Client ID and Client Secret to obtain an access token (for example, via Postman using authorize URL https://oauth.employmenthero.com/oauth2/authorize and token URL https://oauth.employmenthero.com/oauth2/token, with redirect URI https://oauth.pstmn.io/v1/callback). Approve access in the browser to receive the access_token. Note that access tokens expire 15 minutes after creation.

setupSteps.title: Set api_key
setupSteps.body: Enter the OAuth access token as the api_key field. This is the only required, secret credential for the connector.

setupSteps.title: Configure organization and employee IDs (optional)
setupSteps.body: Optionally set organization_configids to the organization ID(s) you want to sync (found as results of the organizations stream) and employees_configids to the employee ID(s) in the given organisation (found in the employees stream). Both fields are optional.

sources.title: Employment Hero Partner Guides (OAuth 2.0, Client ID/Secret, access and refresh tokens, scopes, app registration)
Airbyte Employment-Hero source connector (api_key, organization_configids, employees_configids; obtaining the access token)
